items.q: How do I book Alexander Technique?
items.a: Email bookings@djalexandertechnique.com or use the booking form on the Contact page. Include the date, city, venue/capacity and set time and you'll get a fast reply.

items.q: Where is he based and does he tour internationally?
items.a: He's based in New York City and performs worldwide — most frequently in New York City, Miami, New Jersey, Detroit and London, with sets across the global club circuit.

items.q: What does he play and at what tempo?
items.a: Raw, stripped-down peak-time techno with tech-house roots, typically in the 127–138 BPM range — made for main stages, warehouses and intimate rooms.

items.q: Does he produce and remix for other artists?
items.a: Yes. He releases on Terminator Records, MOOD and his own imprint Data Distortion, and his productions and remixes are regularly played by Carl Cox, Adam Beyer, Kevin Saunderson and The Blessed Madonna.

items.q: Where can I hear and buy his music?
items.a: Stream on SoundCloud and find every release on Beatport, Traxsource and Discogs — all linked from the Music page.
